title: AuroraCobble
description: GYMS | World Boss | Mini Boss | Raids | PlayerShop | GTS | Claim | Ranked Battle
body:
# Welcome to AuroraCobble
# 
**AuroraCobble** is a feature-rich Cobblemon server built for players who want more than a basic survival experience. Travel through a world inspired by the Pokémon universe, challenge Gyms from Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, and Sinnoh, and build your team with powerful battle mechanics and competitive progression.

Our server includes advanced battle features such as Mega Evolution, Terastallization, Dynamax, Gigantamax, and Z-Moves, giving players more ways to train, battle, and create unique strategies. For competitive players, we also offer ranked battles using National Dex rules, creating a serious but enjoyable environment for team building and skill-based battles.

Adventure is a major part of AuroraCobble. World Bosses spawn every 30 minutes, while mini bosses appear across different biomes, giving players regular challenges and rewarding exploration. Alongside combat, the server also supports a strong player economy with player shops, a global trading system, and land claiming so players can safely build, trade, and grow their own space.

**Features**

- Gyms from Kanto, Johto, Hoenn, and Sinnoh
 
- Mega Evolution, Tera, Dynamax, Gigantamax, and Z-Moves
  
- Ranked battles with National Dex rules
  
- World Bosses every 30 minutes
  
- Mini bosses in multiple biomes
  
- Player shops
  
- Global trading system
  
- Land claim system
  
- Progression-focused Cobblemon gameplay

Competitive and adventure content in one server

Whether you enjoy collecting, battling, trading, exploring, or climbing the ranked ladder, AuroraCobble offers a complete Cobblemon experience for every type of player.
